title: Figure 6 in Depth distribution of plant-parasitic nematodes on bentgrass golf greens in Missouri and Indiana
author: McCurdy, Asa L.

description: Figure 6: PCR results using Meloidogyne-specific and M. naasi and M. marylandi-specific primers. DL: DNA Ladder; 1: Meloidogyne spp. (DNA ID:9); 2: M. naasi (DNA ID:9); 3: Meloidogyne spp. (DNA ID:4); 4: M. marylandi (DNA ID:4); and 5: Meloidogyne spp.(DNA ID:4).
